languages.text: "Вы избавили нас от Кошмаров и были добры, даже если мы того не заслуживали. А Император... Покинул нас и обрек на страдания. Никогда уже Его свет не озарит наше небо. Да будет так. Мы отплатим вам своим последним служением".

traits.locale_text: "Вы избавили нас от Кошмаров и были добры, даже если мы того не заслуживали. А Император... Покинул нас и обрек на страдания. Никогда уже Его свет не озарит наше небо. Да будет так. Мы отплатим вам своим последним служением".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Вы избавили нас от Кошмаров и были добры, даже если мы того не заслуживали. А Император... Покинул нас и обрек на страдания. Никогда уже Его свет не озарит наше небо. Да будет так. Мы отплатим вам своим последним служением".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."
languages.original_text: "Вы избавили нас от Кошмаров и были добры, даже если мы того не заслуживали. А Император... Покинул нас и обрек на страдания. Никогда уже Его свет не озарит наше небо. Да будет так. Мы отплатим вам своим последним служением".

traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Du hast uns von den Albträumen befreit und warst gütig, obwohl wir es nicht verdient haben. Was den Imperator betrifft... Er ließ uns im Stich und verdammte uns zum Leiden. Nie wieder wird sein Licht den Himmel unserer sterbenden Welt erhellen. So soll es sein. Wir werden es euch mit unserem letzten Akt der Knechtschaft vergelten."
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."

languages.text: "Vous nous avez débarrassés des Cauchemars et vous avez été bon même si nous ne le méritions pas. Quant à l'Empereur... Il nous a abandonnés et nous a condamnés à la souffrance. Plus jamais sa lumière n'illuminera le ciel de notre monde mourant. Qu'il en soit ainsi. Nous vous rendrons la pareille par notre dernier acte de servitude."
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."

languages.text: "你为我们除掉了梦魇，即使我们不配，你也很仁慈。至于皇帝...他抛弃了我们，注定了我们的苦难他的光辉再也不会照亮 我们这个垂死世界的天空了那就这样吧我们会用最后的奴役来报答你"
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."

languages.text: "Nos libró de las Pesadillas y fue amable a pesar de que no lo merecíamos. En cuanto al Emperador... Nos abandonó y nos condenó al sufrimiento. Nunca más su luz adornará el cielo de nuestro mundo moribundo. Que así sea. Le pagaremos con nuestro último acto de servidumbre".
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."

languages.text: "ナイトメア "を排除し、私たちがそれに値しないにもかかわらず、親切にしてくれた。皇帝は...彼は私たちを見捨て、苦難を運命づけた。皇帝の光が滅びゆく世界の空を照らすことは二度とない。そうであろう。我々は最後の隷属行為で恩返しをしよう"
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."

languages.text: "Bizi Kabuslardan kurtardınız ve hak etmediğimiz halde nazik davrandınız. İmparatora gelince... O bizi terk etti ve acı çekmeye mahkum etti. Onun ışığı bir daha asla ölmekte olan dünyamızın gökyüzünü süslemeyecek. Öyle olsun. Size olan borcumuzu son hizmetkarlığımızla ödeyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "You rid us of the Nightmares and were kind even though we did not deserve it. As for the Emperor... He abandoned us and doomed us to suffering. Never again will His light grace the sky of our dying world. So be it. We will repay you with our last act of servitude."
